title: Pre-Matric, Post Matric and Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship Schemes for Minorities
overview: Financial assistance for minority students to pursue school, higher, technical, and professional education.
text: Title: Pre-Matric, Post Matric and Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship Schemes for Minorities. Short Name: Minority Scholarship Schemes. Type: Central Government. State: India. Provider: Ministry of Minority Affairs. Overview: Financial assistance for minority students to pursue school, higher, technical, and professional education.. Categories: Pre-Matric, Post-Matric, Merit-Cum-Means. Target Groups: Minority students. Eligible Communities: Muslims, Sikhs, Christians, Buddhists, Jains, Parsis. Eligible Courses: School, UG, PG, Technical, Professional. Eligibility: {"minimum_marks_percent": 50, "maximum_family_income": 250000, "domicile_required": false, "state_quota_applicable": true}. Application Mode: Online. Keywords: minority, NSP, government scholarship, technical education

title: AICTE Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students
overview: Scholarship for girls pursuing technical education.
text: Title: AICTE Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students. Short Name: Pragati Scholarship. Type: Central Government. State: India. Provider: AICTE. Overview: Scholarship for girls pursuing technical education.. Categories: Degree, Diploma, Technical Education. Target Groups: Girl students. Eligible Courses: Engineering, Diploma, Technical Education. Eligibility: {"maximum_family_income": 800000, "maximum_girls_per_family": 2}. Benefits: {"tuition_fee_limit": 30000, "incidental_amount_per_month": 2000, "duration_months": 10}. Application Mode: Online. Keywords: girls scholarship, AICTE, technical education

title: Prime Minister Scholarship Scheme
overview: Scholarship for dependent wards and widows of CAPFs, Assam Rifles, and State Police Personnel.
text: Title: Prime Minister Scholarship Scheme. Short Name: PMSS. Type: Central Government. State: India. Provider: Ministry of Home Affairs. Overview: Scholarship for dependent wards and widows of CAPFs, Assam Rifles, and State Police Personnel.. Categories: Professional Courses, Technical Courses. Target Groups: Dependent wards, Widows of CAPFs, State Police Personnel families. Eligible Courses: Professional Courses, Technical Courses. Eligibility: {"minimum_marks_percent": 60, "renewal_marks_percent": 50}. Benefits: {"boys_amount_per_month": 2500, "girls_amount_per_month": 3000}. Application Mode: Online. Keywords: PMSS, police scholarship, CAPF, armed forces

title: Swami Vivekananda Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship Scheme
overview: Scholarship for meritorious students from economically weaker families in West Bengal.
text: Title: Swami Vivekananda Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship Scheme. Short Name: SVMCM. Type: State Government. State: West Bengal. Provider: Government of West Bengal. Overview: Scholarship for meritorious students from economically weaker families in West Bengal.. Categories: Higher Secondary, UG, PG, Technical Education. Target Groups: Economically weaker students. Eligible Courses: Science, Arts, Commerce, Engineering, Medical, Technical, Professional. Eligibility: {"minimum_marks_hs_ug": 60, "minimum_marks_pg_general": 53, "minimum_marks_pg_technical": 55, "maximum_family_income": 250000}. Benefits: {"pg_amount_per_year": 60000}. Application Mode: Online. Keywords: SVMCM, West Bengal, merit scholarship

title: West Bengal Chief Minister Relief Fund Scholarship
overview: Scholarship for financially weak students studying in West Bengal.
special_conditions: Cannot receive another government scholarship simultaneously

Eligibility: {"madhyamik_minimum_marks_percent": 60, "hs_minimum_marks_percent": 60, "ug_minimum_marks_percent": 55, "maximum_family_income": 120000, "domicile_required": true}. Application Mode: Offline/Online. Keywords: Nabanna, CM Relief Fund, West Bengal

title: West Bengal Freeship Scheme
overview: Tuition fee waiver scheme for undergraduate technical students in private institutions.
special_conditions: Students under TFW or SVMCM are not eligible
text: Title: West Bengal Freeship Scheme. Short Name: WBFS. Type: State Government. State: West Bengal. Provider: Government of West Bengal. Overview: Tuition fee waiver scheme for undergraduate technical students in private institutions.. Categories: UG, Engineering, Technical Education. Target Groups: Economically weaker students. Eligible Courses: Engineering, Technology, Pharmacy, Architecture. Eligibility: {"maximum_family_income": 250000, "domicile_required": true, "state_requirement": "West Bengal"}. Benefits: {"tuition_fee_waiver": true}. Application Mode: Online. Keywords: WBFS, fee waiver, engineering scholarship
